title: Department Manager Vacancy at Croma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Croma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Croma in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
